basic_details.job_title: WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Kabirdham
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Kabirdham (WCD Kabirdham) IT Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website www.kawardha.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Up to 45 years for Chhattisgarh residents as per state rules.

qualification.details: Graduate degree in Computer/IT field from a recognized university. Proficiency in MS Office and Computer Typing. Minimum 3 years of experience in data management/web-based reporting in government/semi-government organizations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kawardha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the WCD Kabirdham IT Assistant recruitment is 23rd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Computer/IT field from a recognized university, possess proficiency in MS Office and computer typing, and have at least 3 years of experience in data management or web-based reporting.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the IT Assistant position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for Chhattisgarh residents as per state rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the IT Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,900 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the IT Assistant post in the Women and Child Development Department Kabirdham.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IT Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the IT Assistant role will involve the creation of a Merit List, followed by an Interview and a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for WCD Kabirdham?
faq.answer: The official website for the Women and Child Development Department Kabirdham is www.kawardha.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, along with the application form.
